tier_1.title: Sandstorm
tier_1.description: A wall of amber dust swallows the horizon and races toward you. The sky goes dark in minutes.
tier_1.success: You find a rock outcrop in time and shelter until the storm passes.
tier_1.failure: The storm catches you in the open. You lose half a day stumbling blind.

tier_1.title: Midday Sun
tier_1.description: The sun reaches its zenith. The air shimmers. Every step costs twice what it should.
tier_1.success: You pace the march and conserve water. No rations lost.
tier_1.failure: Two canteens run dry. Someone shows signs of heat exhaustion.

tier_1.title: Buried Trader's Cache
tier_1.description: A weathered marker post juts from the sand. Something was buried here deliberately.
tier_1.success: Wrapped oilskins, hardtack, and a small waterskin. Emergency stores.
tier_1.failure: You dig and dig. Either it's gone or you misjudged the marker.

tier_2.title: Oasis
tier_2.description: Palm fronds catch the wind above a shallow pool. Too good to be true — or just lucky?
tier_2.success: Clean water and date palms. You fill every vessel and rest in the shade.
tier_2.failure: Brackish and foul. The water will make you sick if you drink it.

tier_2.title: Giant Scorpion Nest
tier_2.description: The sand shifts around a low dune cluster. Pincers emerge from holes you didn't see.
tier_2.success: You spot the telltale burrow holes and circle around.

tier_3.title: Sand Wurm
tier_3.description: The ground vibrates with a rhythmic thud. A ring of teeth erupts from the dune directly ahead.
tier_3.success: You feel the vibrations early. Walk on rock. Scatter. It passes beneath you.
tier_3.failure: It surfaces under the party. Scatter or be swallowed.

tier_3.title: Mirage Labyrinth
tier_3.description: Three routes shimmer ahead. Landmarks repeat. You've been here before — or have you?
tier_3.success: You navigate by stars and trust the compass over your eyes.
tier_3.failure: Two days walking in an enormous circle before the error is caught.

tier_4.title: Ancient Tomb Entrance
tier_4.description: A monolithic doorway rises from the sand where no structure should exist. Hieroglyphs warn of sleeping guardians. The darkness beyond is absolute.
tier_4.success: You scout the approach carefully and identify the guardian patrol pattern. Entry is possible.
tier_4.failure: Stone figures animate the moment you touch the door frame.
tier_4.notes: On success the party may enter the tomb as a dungeon encounter. Failure triggers immediate combat.
